name: Strawberry Oat Bran Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Strawberries, frozen, unsweetened, with juice (slightly thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender and mix until well blended.
2. Line 6 custard cups with 2 cupcake liners.
3. Fill each cup about 3/4 full.
4. Arrange the cups in a circle in the microwave.
5. Microwave on HIGH for 3 to 3 1/2 minutes.
6. Allow the muffins to cool before serving.
Nutritional analysis:
118 Calories, Carb 21 G, Fat 4 G, Protein 4 G, Fiber 2 G, Sodium 74 mg, Cholesterol Trace.
